# Receipts Journals

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:94e6e960db4a430aeb3e64946e00b41723fc5f8653c7e31e3109388511e46b8e
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Define journals exclusive to receipts and automatically use them in sale and purchase receipts
A normal journal cannot be used in receipts if a receipt journal has been created.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Go to Accounting -> Configuration -> Settings and activate in section "Customer Invoices" option "Sale Receipt"
2. If you need only/also Vendor receipt go to Vendor Bills > Purchase Receipt
3. Go to Accounting -> Configuration -> Journals and you will find 2 new Journals for receipts one for sales and one for purchases, you can rename them, archive or delete for creating a new ones.

## Changelog

This module partially comes from module `l10n_it_corrispettivi` of <https://github.com/OCA/l10n-italy> version 12.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_receipt_journal.models.account_journal.AccountJournal.action_create_new
documentation: Create a new Receipt from the Dashboard

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_receipt_journal.models.account_journal.AccountJournal._check_receipts_sequence
documentation:
Ensure that journals with receipts checked, are on a higher sequence
that the rest of journals of the same type

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_receipt_journal.tests.test_receipts.TestReceipts.test_receipt_exclusive_journal
documentation: Test exclusivity constraint for receipt journals.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_receipt_journal.models.account_move.AccountMove._update_receipts_journal
documentation:
Update `vals_list` in place to set journal_id to the receipt journal
when move_type is receipt.

Model defaults are also considered it move_type or journal_id
are not in a `vals_list`.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_receipt_journal.models.account_move.AccountMove._check_receipts_journal
documentation:
Ensure that Receipt Journal is only used in Receipts
if exists Receipt Journals for its type
